description: Release archive + push follow-up: promoted polished Google-ML-inspired UI while preserving resilient import/day detail behavior.

archive.description: Refined Google ML Guides visual direction: neutral gray page background, pill navigation, subtle bordered cards, tighter radii, and cleaner typography hierarchy.
UI refresh inspired by Google ML Guides: light surfaces, cleaner nav/buttons, improved focus states, and updated visual hierarchy across app cards and forms.
Improved app resilience: safer JSON import handling, selected-day restore on import, fallback rendering when plan data is missing, and defensive linking hints.
Google-inspired UI refresh, clickable day resources, daily mini tests, Firebase auth scaffold for anonymous plus Google sign-in, and 118 SVG illustration assets.
Initial daily plan and Firebase scaffolding update.
